_meta.notes: SWMC positive=cost convention in rate sheet. Gov FICO adj: negative in sheet = credit to borrower = stored as positive productFeature. Promos are monthly — update when sheet changes.

promos.label: APRIL WHOLESALE PROMO: 25 bps credit on Conventional
FHA & USDA APRIL SPECIAL: 35 bps credit

_govFicoAdj_note: Applies to FHA and VA. Values are NEGATED from SWMC sheet (sheet negative=credit → stored as positive for engine productFeature: price += value). Skip _additional suffix keys (streamline-only).
_govStateAdj_note: Applies to FHA and VA. TX=-0.125 in sheet = credit → stored as 0.125. WA=0.125 in sheet = cost → stored as -0.125.
_govPropertyAdj_note: Applies to FHA/VA. Costs (positive in sheet) are stored NEGATED. VA-specific entries are skipped for now.
_loanAmtAdj_note: Applies to FHA/VA. Sheet shows -0.25 = credit → stored as positive 0.25.
